chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. NO.D- 6726/2015 ________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ 1. FOR HEARING OF MISC. 33650/2015 2. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE 04.11.2015 Syed Mureed Ali Shah advocate for petitioner Mr. Mukesh Kumar AAG ------------------------- Mr. Salahuddin Ahmed advocate has filed his Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.4 which is taken on record. The case of petitioner is that the respondent No.4 is a resident of Town Committee Gharo and is contesting elections from the Union Council Bhambhore, Taluka Mir Sakro District Thatta, therefore, his candidature may be annulled. Council for the respondent No.4 has pointed out that this objection was not raised at the time of scrutiny of the nomination papers. Be that as it may, let respondent No.4 contest elections. In case the respondent No.4 succeeds in election, the petitioner may seek remedy before the competent court of law. Under circumstances, this petition is dismissed alongwith listed applications. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE MUSHARRAF ALI

Under circumstances, this petition is dismissed alongwith listed applications. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE MUSHARRAF ALI ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. NO.D- 298/2004 ________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ 1. FOR HEARING OF MISC. 4885/2015 2. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE 04.11.2015 Mr. Shaiq Usmani advocate Mr. Muhammad Nawaz Abbasi advocate Mr. Saifullah AAG ------------------------- Let Mr. Shaiq Usmani go through order dated 23.4.2015 passed by this Court in C.P.No.D-1039/2014. Adjourned to 19.11.2015. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE MUSHARRAF ALI

Adjourned to 19.11.2015. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE MUSHARRAF ALI ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. NO.D- 6048/2015 ________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ 3. FOR ORDERS ON MISC. 33593/2015 4. FOR HEARING OF MISC. 30374/2015 5. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE 04.11.2015 Mr. Muhammad Faheem advocate for petitioner Mr. M. Aslam Butt DAG ------------------------- Being aggrieved by order passed in the departmental proceedings the petitioners have filed appeal before the Appellate Tribunal Inland Revenue of Pakistan Karachi Bench Karachi. Counsel for the petitioner contends that direction be given to the Tribunal to decide the matter expeditiously and meanwhile the recovery proceedings may not be initiated against the petitioners. Under circumstances, we direct the Tribunal to decide the appeal of petitioners within a period of 30 days and within this period recovery proceedings may not be initiated against the petitioners. This petition stands disposed of in above terms alongwith listed application. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE MUSHARRAF ALI ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. NO.D- 6049/2015 ________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ 6. FOR ORDERS ON MISC. 33592/2015 7. FOR HEARING OF MISC. 30371/2015 8. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE 04.11.2015 Mr. Muhammad Faheem advocate for petitioner Mr. M. Aslam Butt DAG ------------------------- Being aggrieved by order passed in the departmental proceedings the petitioners have filed appeal before the Appellate Tribunal Inland Revenue of Pakistan Karachi Bench Karachi.

M. Aslam Butt DAG ------------------------- Being aggrieved by order passed in the departmental proceedings the petitioners have filed appeal before the Appellate Tribunal Inland Revenue of Pakistan Karachi Bench Karachi. Counsel for the petitioner contends that direction be given to the Tribunal to decide the matter expeditiously and meanwhile the recovery proceedings may not be initiated against the petitioners. Under circumstances, we direct the Tribunal to decide the appeal of petitioners within a period of 30 days and within this period recovery proceedings may not be initiated against the petitioners. This petition stands disposed of in above terms alongwith listed application. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE MUSHARRAF ALI

This petition stands disposed of in above terms alongwith listed application. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE MUSHARRAF ALI ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. NO.D- 6419/2015 ________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ 9. FOR ORDERS ON OFFICE OBJECTION NO.1 10. FOR HEARING OF MISC. 32383/2015 11. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE 04.11.2015 Mr. Noor Ahmed advocate holding brief for Malik Khushal advocate for petitioner Mr. M. Bux Awan advocate for respondent Mr. Mukesh Kumar AAG ------------------------- Adjournment has been sought on behalf of the petitioner`s counsel. Adjourned. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE MUSHARRAF ALI

Adjourned. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE MUSHARRAF ALI ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. FOR HEARING OF MISC. 33730/2015 2. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE 04.11.2015 Mr. Munawar Ali Memon advocate for petitioner Mr. Mukesh Kumar AAG ------------------------- Comments be filed within one week`s time. Adjourned to 18.11.2015. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE MUSHARRAF ALI

Adjourned to 18.11.2015. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE MUSHARRAF ALI ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. NO.D- 6627/2015 ________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ 1. FOR ORDERS ON MISC. 33183/2015 2. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE 04.11.2015 Mr. Faisal Ahmed A. Memon advocate for petitioner Mr. Mukesh Kumar AAG ------------------------- This petition challenges the candidature of two candidates on the ground that they are not `Sadiq` and `Amin`. There is no adjudication of a Court of law to support this claim. This petition is, therefore, dismissed alongwith listed application. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE MUSHARRAF ALI

This petition is, therefore, dismissed alongwith listed application. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE MUSHARRAF ALI ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. FOR ORDERS ON MISC. 33179/2015 2. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE 04.11.2015 Mr. Faisal Ahmed A. Memon advocate for petitioner Mr. Mukesh Kumar AAG ------------------------- The petition challenges the candidature of two candidates on the ground that they are not `Sadiq` and `Amin`. There is no adjudication of a Court of law to support this claim. This petition is, therefore, dismissed alongwith listed application. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE MUSHARRAF ALI

This petition is, therefore, dismissed alongwith listed application. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE MUSHARRAF ALI ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. NO.D- 6628/2015 ________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ 1. FOR ORDERS ON MISC. 33181/2015 2. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE 04.11.2015 Mr. Fasail Ahmed A. Memon advocate for petitioner Mr. Mukesh Kumar AAG ------------------------- The factual position is that the petitioner and his seconder are the resident of different wards which fact is not denied, hence this court cannot interfere with election proceedings at this stage. This petition is dismissed alongwith listed application. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE MUSHARRAF ALI

This petition is dismissed alongwith listed application. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE MUSHARRAF ALI ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. NO.D- 6724/2015 ________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE 04.11.2015 Mr. Munawar Hussain advocate for petitioner Mr. Mukesh Kumar AAG ------------------------- The case of petitioner is that his nomination papers were not accepted by the Returning Officer. This is a petition filed at a belated stage as the time for scrutiny has also gone. At this stage we cannot interfere. This petition is dismissed. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE MUSHARRAF ALI

This petition is dismissed. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE MUSHARRAF ALI ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P.
